messages.author: ThrustMaster
messages.content: Welcome to the Community Board! Share your tunes, tips, and flights here. Happy flying! 🚁

messages.author: AirBender
messages.content: Pro tip: Always calibrate your accelerometer on a flat surface BEFORE your first flight. Makes a big difference in angle mode!

messages.author: FPV_Academy
messages.content: Beginners: Start with low rates (rc_rate ~0.6) and work your way up as you get more comfortable. Don't rush it!

messages.author: NightOwl
messages.content: My Velvet King tune is now in the library. Perfect for smooth cinematic passes at dusk. Let me know what you think!

messages.author: YX
